focus: Tutti phase-by-phase build, then research+enhance each phase
nextResearchTheme: Brief v18 item 1 done (suggestMeal ranking; 194 tests). NEXT: items 2-3+5 - Home suggestion card. In App compute const suggestion = suggestMeal(meals, notes, {nowMs: Date.now()}); pass to Home with onCookSuggested = (meal)=>restoreMeal(meal). Home renders a 'Tonight?' card when suggestion: meal.name + reason + 'Cook this' button -> onCookSuggested(suggestion.meal). Fallback (item 3): when meals empty, App passes a synthetic suggestion {meal:{id:'thali',name:'South Indian thali',dishIds:ALL_DISHES,servings:{},target,savedAt:0,kind:'saved'}, reason:'A great first meal to try'} so new users still get a suggestion. Item 5: Home/App test that the suggestion card renders + 'Cook this' restores (lands in pick or sets dishes). Verify in browser. Then Brief v18 done -> research + author Brief v19.
